output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Get It Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legally backed demand letter in 60 seconds for only $19.99.
content_outline: Is Your Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? You're Not Alone
What Landlords Can Legally Deduct (And What They Can't)
How Long Should It Take? State Deadlines for Deposit Returns
DIY Demand Letter: The $19.99 Alternative to a Lawyer
Next Steps If Your Landlord Still Refuses to Return Your Deposit
key_points: Landlords often illegally withhold deposits for normal wear and tear or fake cleaning fees.
Most states require deposit returns within 14–30 days; missing the deadline weakens the landlord's position.
Deposits-Back.com lets tenants generate a state-specific demand letter in 60 seconds with no sign-up or subscription.
A formal letter of demand is often enough to force compliance without the cost of an attorney.
output.cta: Stop waiting. Get your deposit back now. Create your state-specific demand letter at Deposits-Back.com in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no sign-up, no subscription.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlord is withholding, deducting unfairly from, or refusing to return their security deposit.
